steps.title: Use context clues to identify the meaning needed
steps.content:
The sentence says Ochoa "doesn't have a definite idea of when it might happen" — she holds an uncertain belief about the future. The word "conjecture" in the next sentence confirms the blank must mean forming an opinion without complete knowledge.
  • Choice A — 'demands': Demands means to require or insist — this implies authority and certainty, not uncertainty. ✗
  • Choice B — 'speculates': Speculates means to form an opinion based on incomplete information — this matches both the uncertain context and the label "conjecture." ✓
  • Choice C — 'doubts': Doubts means to be uncertain whether something is true — this contradicts Ochoa's interest in research motivated by this belief. ✗
  • Choice D — 'establishes': Establishes means to determine with certainty — this contradicts "doesn't have a definite idea." ✗

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: Only one choice describes forming a belief under uncertainty. That matches choice B — B is correct.
